_comment: Control Tower account topology. Copy to control-tower.config.json and fill in. ONE flight per account (the collector) — no merge flight. Each account writes its graph into <ct_database>.<schema>; for multiple accounts, each non-main account shares its control_tower and the main account's collector folds the shares in. 'env' values must match your build-dive dives.config.json so account identity is verified on every write. Single account = just collect -> write (drop the extra accounts[] entries).

accounts._comment: Optional additional account (a producer). It runs its own collector and shares its control_tower; the main account's collector folds it in via INBOUND_SHARES (stamped at deploy).
